examples.title: Algorithm: Contiguous Allocation
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ContiguousAllocation
INPUT: file size, block size
OUTPUT: starting block address, number of blocks

BEGIN
 IF free space available THEN
 allocate contiguous blocks
 update directory entry with starting block address and number of blocks
 ELSE
 handle error
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of contiguous allocation algorithm
